steps: Browse any category — Tours, Hotels, Cars, or Rentals — using the tabs on the homepage.
Click on a card you like to view more details, or click 'Book Now'.
A booking form will open — fill in your Full Name, Email, and Phone Number.
For hotels/tours, select your Check-In and Check-Out dates and number of Guests (Adults/Children).
For cars, select your rental dates and any add-ons shown.
Review the Total Estimated Price shown at the bottom of the form.
Add any Special Requests if needed (optional).
Click 'Confirm Booking' to complete your reservation.
You'll instantly see a confirmation screen with your Booking ID, and a confirmation email will be sent to you.
bookingProcess.cancellation: Free cancellation is available up to 24 hours before your booking start date.
bookingProcess.support: For help with an existing booking or any issues, contact our support team — available 24/7.
